query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `email_alert_recipients` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `name` varchar(128), `active` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `addedBy` varchar(128), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `email_alert_recipients_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
